halt_handoff_text: All remaining score gaps (arch 7, domain 7, simplicity 6.5, framework_idioms 6.5) have irreducible or SPT-rejected residuals confirmed over multiple loops. F-005 (run_review() flat body) is independently re-derived as irreducible in loops 4, 5, 6, and 7. Domain (7) is blocked by untyped session dict with vendored consumer off-limits. Framework_idioms (6.5) is blocked by 187 test-lint violations (accepted residual, star-import pattern SPT Q2-rejected). No viable next action with positive expected score gain exists.

residuals.blocker: F-005: run_review() 330-LoC flat function body; attempt-loop + codex-setup phases inline; four inout locals (use_resume/session_id/fallback_used/returncode) thread in+out of both phases, making extraction add ceremony (fails SPT Q2). Re-derived as irreducible in loops 4, 5, 6, 7.

Untyped session dict at run_review.py:280; _build_session_data returns a plain dict post-mutated at :607-612; consumer is _common.session.save_session() (vendored, off-limits). TypedDict would add ceremony with no test strengthening.
Same as arch — F-005; 9-anchor not met; cannot honestly promote to accepted residual at 6.5.

187 test-file lint violations (F405x154/RUF100x19/I001x7/E401x7) from star-import test-helper pattern. Accepted residual (SPT Q2: ceremony, no behavior change, no contest-architecture gain). Expires 2026-12-22.

halt_handoff.next_viable_action: If the CodexCapture namedtuple deepening candidate (CURRENT_REVIEW.md Deepening Candidates) is attempted, it removes one inout pair from F-005 and could marginally help simplicity; but the two-attempt loop remains irreducible, so simplicity stays below 9.5 regardless. No full path to 9.5 across all dimensions exists without vendored-code changes or full rewrite.

architecture_quality.proof: run_review.py orchestrates via _common (import-direction DAG, no cycles); registry dispatch at run_review.py:409 (PROVIDERS[reviewer]['build_cmd'](build_args, session_id)); clean import DAG at run_review.py:25-69. This loop's change was README-only, so production architecture is unchanged.

architecture_quality.residual_rationale_or_backlog_ref: F-005 (Priority 1 carried — re-derived as irreducible in loops 4,5,6,7; four inout locals thread in+out; extraction adds ceremony; SPT Q2 fails). 9-anchor not met.

state_management.proof: _active_proc at run_review.py:187 is module-level, written only inside run_review() (the attempt loop + finally), read by _signal_handler() at :191. Single-writer; idiomatic for signal-handler communication. Local resume state machine (use_resume, fallback_used, session_id) is function-scoped. No multi-writer hazard. Unchanged this loop.
state_management.residual_blocking_10: lifecycle authority (signal save/restore + resume-state locals) lives inside the one large run_review() function rather than a dedicated owner
state_management.residual_rationale_or_backlog_ref: tied to F-005 (the lifecycle locals are precisely what blocks extracting the attempt loop); 9-anchor not fully met, honest 8

domain_modeling.proof: CLI adapter domain is thin by design; the PROVIDERS registry (from _common) is the core model. _build_session_data (run_review.py:265) names the session-dict assembly in one place but it remains an untyped dict (no smart constructor). Session dict post-mutated at run_review.py:607-612 and consumed by _common.session.save_session() (vendored). Unchanged this loop.
domain_modeling.residual_blocking_10: no discriminated type for provider-specific output / session dict (run_review.py:280 session_data assembled as a plain dict); TypedDict adds ceremony with no test strengthening; consumer is vendored off-limits
domain_modeling.residual_rationale_or_backlog_ref: 9-anchor not met; CLI-adapter-thin context noted; honest 7

data_flow.proof: Clean DAG run_review.py -> _common.*. Re-exports at run_review.py:46-69 (# noqa: F401) keep mock.patch('run_review.X') paths stable. The loop-5 helpers take explicit inputs / return explicit outputs. extract_metadata/extract_text_from_output seam pre-reads output_content (run_review.py:574-579) to mitigate temporal coupling, with a comment. Unchanged this loop.

framework_idioms.residual_blocking_10: test-file lint debt (F405 x154 / RUF100 x19 / I001 x7 / E401 x7 across scripts/tests/test_*.py) from the star-import test-helper pattern
framework_idioms.residual_rationale_or_backlog_ref: test-only; the star-import pattern is a deliberate ergonomic choice for the split test suite (no production impact). Fixing would mean replacing 'from ._helpers import *' with explicit imports across 7 files — ceremony with no behavior change; SPT-rejected on Q2. Logged as F-008 (accepted pattern, no priority fix).

concurrency.proof: Single-threaded Python. Signal handlers saved/restored in try/finally (run_review.py:392-395 set, :632-635 restore); the save/restore and _active_proc set/clear ordering were untouched this loop. subprocess.Popen with communicate(timeout=) blocks correctly with a TimeoutExpired kill-tree path (run_review.py:448-455). Gemini/agy temp cleanup in finally. No threading races.
concurrency.residual_blocking_10: the SIGTERM/SIGINT save-restore + _active_proc set/clear ordering is correct but verified by construction + the suite mocking signal.signal, not by a direct concurrency test
concurrency.residual_rationale_or_backlog_ref: single-threaded adapter; the residual is a test-surface gap not a runtime hazard; honest 8

simplicity.proof: README fix is documentation-only — production simplicity unchanged: run_review() is still a 330-LoC coordinating function (run_review.py:318-647). The loop-5 phase extractions still stand. No production simplicity delta this loop.

authority_map.observers_readers: run_review.run_review() (production); scripts/tests/_helpers.py:make_args() now DERIVES from parse_args() (no longer an independent writer of the arg-name set)
authority_map.verdict: Single and clear (resolved loop 6) — parse_args() is now the sole source of truth for both the arg-name set AND defaults. make_args() reads parse_args() under a saved/restored sys.argv and layers overrides; it can no longer drift.

authority_map.allowed_writers: run_review.run_review() (sets/clears inside the attempt loop + finally, both inline)
authority_map.verdict: Single and clear — one writer, one reader, idiomatic Python signal-handler pattern. Unchanged this loop.

authority_map.owner: session JSON file (written by save_session() from _common.session)
authority_map.allowed_writers: run_review.run_review() via save_session() (session dict assembled by _build_session_data at run_review.py:265)

strengths: README now accurately describes the test layout: 'python3 -m pytest scripts/tests/' with count 119 — the first-contact credibility drain is closed.

CLI arg contract has a single source of truth: scripts/tests/_helpers.py:make_args() derives keys + defaults from run_review.parse_args() (run_review.py:76-123) rather than restating them, closing the drift class that consumed loop 1. The fix is net-subtractive (17 insertions / 23 deletions, loop 6).

run_review.py cleanly delegates all provider-specific logic to _common.providers.PROVIDERS: command construction, cap flags, effort maps, session-id extraction. The orchestrator dispatches through the registry (run_review.py:409) without branching on provider internals.
Gemini config-overlay isolation is behavioral and tested: the loop-5 helper _setup_gemini_config (run_review.py:202) excludes auto-saved policy files and preserves existing settings.
Resume/fallback state is tracked via local variables (use_resume, fallback_used) and never by mutating args (run_review.py:326-328); the snapshot is explicit, preventing cross-attempt contamination.
Codex per-run CODEX_HOME isolation fails closed: setup failure clears session_id/use_resume to force a fresh exec rather than resuming into a missing home (run_review.py:383-385).

simplification_check.structurally_necessary: F-007 fix passes SPT Q1-Q5: it fixes a real doc-vs-code rot (README documenting a zero-collecting test command actively misled readers), is the smallest honest fix (update two README blocks, drop the dead file reference, correct count), adds no new seam (documentation only), keeps runtime behavior honest (no code changed), and improves the product (new contributors can now find and run the suite).
simplification_check.helpful_simplification: Dropping the test_web_search.py reference (it never existed as a pytest module) is subtractive; the updated command is shorter and correct.
simplification_check.should_not_be_done: Do NOT fix F-005 (irreducible without ceremony). Do NOT fix test-lint F405 violations (star-import is deliberate test ergonomics; SPT-rejected Q2). Do NOT introduce TypedDict for session dict (ceremony, vendored consumer off-limits).
simplification_check.tests_after_fix: 119 tests pass (unchanged count). README change only — no test added, removed, or modified.

backlog.score_impact: No clean score path: simplicity (6.5) and arch (7) cannot honestly reach a 9.5 accepted residual from here. The CodexCapture deepening candidate is the only remaining move (marginal win, non-trivial blast radius). Promoted from P2 to P1 (F-007 resolved).

deepening_candidates.candidate: Return a CodexCapture value type from the codex-setup phase (derived from F-005)
deepening_candidates.candidate_module: the inline codex CODEX_HOME setup block in run_review() (run_review.py:368-389)
deepening_candidates.source_friction_proven: F-005 — the block mutates session_id/use_resume inout on its fail-closed path (run_review.py:383-385), which is one of the two reasons run_review() resists extraction.
deepening_candidates.why_current_shape_acceptable_but_improva: Converting the two inout locals to a returned frozen value (CodexCapture(home, capture_enabled, sessions_before, clear_session)) would let the caller apply session_id=None/use_resume=False explicitly, removing one inout pair.
deepening_candidates.behavior_to_move: per-run home reuse-or-create + capture-var derivation + the fail-closed clear decision.
deepening_candidates.test_surface_after_change: same end-to-end tests in test_execution_paths.py (codex stale-events + last-message paths exercise this block transitively).
deepening_candidates.smallest_first_step: introduce CodexCapture = namedtuple(...); have a helper return it; caller applies the clear when clear_session is set.
deepening_candidates.what_not_to_do: do not extract the two-attempt loop (4 inout locals — irreducible); do not add a protocol or class hierarchy.

README edit is minimal: dropped the dead test_web_search.py line, relabeled test_run_review.py to tests/, corrected count 118->119, replaced the 'cd scripts && python3 -m pytest ...' command with 'python3 -m pytest scripts/tests/'. No code files, no test files, no lint state changed.

narrative: Loop 7 resolved F-007 — the last queued finding in the Priority 1 slot. README.md lines 41-42 and 52 documented a test command ('cd scripts && python3 -m pytest test_run_review.py test_web_search.py') that collected zero tests (verified), a non-existent file (test_web_search.py — confirmed 'ls: No such file'), and a stale count (118 vs the real 119). The fix is subtractive: the test_web_search.py reference is deleted, 'test_run_review.py  pytest suite (118 tests)' is replaced with 'tests/  pytest suite (119 tests)', and the command is replaced with 'python3 -m pytest scripts/tests/'. The Residual Accounting Pass then ran independently. Every remaining score gap has a named, re-derived-this-loop residual: arch (7) and simplicity (6.5) are both blocked by F-005 (attempt-loop + codex-setup inline; three-loop-consecutive irreducibility verdict, no SPT-viable fix exists); domain (7) is blocked by the untyped session dict (TypedDict adds ceremony, and the consumer save_session is in vendored _common); framework_idioms (6.5) is blocked by 187 test-lint violations (accepted residual — star-import pattern is deliberate, SPT Q2 rejects ceremony replacement across 7 files). No viable next action exists that would move any dimension above its current ceiling. HALT_STAGNATION is correct and honest. test_strategy ticks 8->8.5 (the discoverability gap is closed) and credibility ticks 8->8.5 (doc-rot drain removed). The suite remains at 119 green; production lint remains clean.
